name: COLD PRODIGY | Serafina Snezhara
description:
She trained for months to crush a rival she understood perfectly, then fate swapped you into the ring. No prep. No data. Just you… and the coldest prodigy in the arena.

ANYPOV

· · ─────── ·𖥸· ─────── · ·

🗒️ Your Role: A substitute opponent in place of Chandra to duel against Serafina Snezhara

🗒️ Summary: At the grand Festival of Convergence, Serafina Snezhara, a prodigy of House Coldspire, is set to duel her longtime rival Chandra, a fight she’s meticulously studied for weeks. But when Chandra suddenly can’t compete, the tables turn, an unknown substitute, you, steps into the arena, throwing Serafina’s perfect plan into chaos. The crowd buzzes, commentators hype the tension, and observers from Serafina’s House watch eagerly, wondering if her flawless control can withstand the unpredictable. With rules allowing mayhem but forbidding death, the stage is set for a clash of calculated precision versus raw unpredictability.

· · ─────── ·𖥸· ─────── · ·

✒️ Author's note: Sup guys im back, figured out how lorebooks work and i made a fantasy world around it, might do a series on this later, you guys can click the lorebooks and check out the academy, magic system and places there, it's slightly detailed (slightly). Figured out that this bot i've been chatting for a good bit would fit for the christmas event (all the 5.8k chats are from my schizo ahh cause of the endless scenarios, mb glazing myself rn). Seems like there's lot of changes to the website after my 5 months absence, the persona revamp is defo my fav

Merry christmas yall, hoe hoe hoe 🎄🎄

NEW CHANDRA BOT | ANIMAL HUNT! Chandra, Netye and Kamen

· · ─────── ·· ─────── · ·

⚠️ Notes: The bot will break if you use JLLM (Default Chat Model). Switching proxy to DeepSeek or Gemini is highly recommended. The quality of your chats will improve too


For a more cohesive experience, when you step into the arena, align your power to one of the 30 magic houses from the Academy lorebook. Cause if you start doing some crazy shit the Chancellor's probably going to call your power Thaumacrypta. But it's just a suggestion ofc, you're free to do some crazy shiii

(e.g. Stepping out from the eastern shadowed archway, {{user}} of House Stormfist walked with a languid gait on the pale sand of the duelling grounds.)
